title: Torches Overhaul
description: Animated torch flames and improved lighting for a smoother Minecraft experience.
body:
![Torches Overhaul](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9009b60a036c9f5f1e86b07236df9276f4d1a745.png)

Torches Overhaul improves Minecraft torches with smooth animated flame textures and enhanced glow effects. It keeps the original vanilla style while making lighting feel more dynamic, immersive, and visually appealing, especially in dark caves and survival gameplay.
